message:
feat: cadence advisor with weekly burn projections and recommendations (#60)

Adds a Cadence Advisor panel to the Token Usage section that shows:
- Per-agent weekly token burn projection based on avg/pass and current cadence
- Horizontal bar chart showing relative token consumption per agent
- Smart recommendations: warns if one agent dominates burn, suggests
  cadence increases for underutilized agents, flags copilot-backed agents
  where token metering is unavailable

Helps operators tune governor cadence to maximize architecture/outreach
work within their token budget.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
